text:
It was a beautiful autumn afternoon. Luna was taking a leisurely walk through her favorite park. Birds sang sweet melodies. There was a cool breeze, and every now and then a gentle leaf would fall.

Suddenly, a strange creature swooped down. It wasn’t like anything Luna had ever seen. Its fur was iridescent, and glowing spots danced across its eyes. Its long neck topped a huge head crowned with thick ears.

“What delightful thing is that?” Luna wondered.

Curiosity drove her closer. Perhaps she could help.

Carefully approaching, Luna bent down. Suddenly she felt a tickle.

“Blubber!” she giggled.

That was nothing. Something else was definitely wrong. There was a struggle.

Luna leaped back.

“Oh dear!”

The thing wasn’t hurting her. Maybe she could talk?

She made herself brave.

“Quiet?”

That got a tiny snuffle.

“I’m Luna—I love birds.”

There was a tiny flutter. Could she communicate? She’d
